understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are simultaneously occupied, which triggers WIN and advances through all levels to complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A single piece is active at a time; MOVE_* commands move the active piece one tile unless blocked by walls/obstacles (and any pushing only works when the adjacent object is pushable and the space beyond is free). CLICK on a selectable piece’s coordinates switches which piece is active (or, in some levels, attempts to move/act toward the clicked location depending on the rules); if the destination/path is invalid or blocked, the piece does not move. Walls are impassable, obstacles block movement, and each action consumes one step from a limited per-level budget, so inefficient clicks/moves can exhaust the budget before reaching a WIN state.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by positioning every selectable piece onto the goal tiles marked with a '+' so that all goals are simultaneously occupied, which triggers WIN and advances through all levels to complete the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: A single piece is active at a time; MOVE_* commands move the active piece one tile unless blocked by walls/obstacles (and any pushing only works when the adjacent object is pushable and the space beyond is free). CLICK on a selectable piece’s coordinates switches which piece is active (or, in some levels, attempts to move/act toward the clicked location depending on the rules); if the destination/path is invalid or blocked, the piece does not move. Walls are impassable, obstacles block movement, and each action consumes one step from a limited per-level budget, so inefficient clicks/moves can exhaust the budget before reaching a WIN state.
